alerts.title: FKA Twigs Tour - 2026 Body High Tour Schedule & Tickets
alerts.description: The Body High Tour is FKA Twigs' 2026 world tour in support of her critically acclaimed albums EUSEXUA and EUSEXUA Afterglow. The tour features immersive performances showcasing her skills in dance, martial arts, and avant-garde visual artistry, with stops across North America and Europe including Madison Square Garden, Coachella, and London's O2 Arena. Artist presales began December 2, 2025, with general on-sale starting December 5, 2025 at 10:00 AM local time via Ticketmaster.
